readiness_overview_columns.sql_string:
---- Columns readiness_overview (hvdcxm)
DESCRIBE SELECT * FROM (select
    sum(case when status = 'active' then 1 else 0 end) as active_use_cases,
    count(distinct research_area) as research_areas_covered,
    sum(case when status = 'blocked' then 1 else 0 end) as constrained_use_cases
from greenplanetmart.reporting_readiness
) AS "inputQuery-Jl"

readiness_overview_length.sql_string:
---- Length readiness_overview (hvdcxm)
SELECT COUNT(*) as rowCount FROM (SELECT * FROM (select
    sum(case when status = 'active' then 1 else 0 end) as active_use_cases,
    count(distinct research_area) as research_areas_covered,
    sum(case when status = 'blocked' then 1 else 0 end) as constrained_use_cases
from greenplanetmart.reporting_readiness
) AS "inputQuery-Jl")

readiness_overview_data.sql_string:
---- Data readiness_overview hvdcxm
SELECT * FROM (select
    sum(case when status = 'active' then 1 else 0 end) as active_use_cases,
    count(distinct research_area) as research_areas_covered,
    sum(case when status = 'blocked' then 1 else 0 end) as constrained_use_cases
from greenplanetmart.reporting_readiness
) AS "inputQuery-Jl"

readiness_detail_columns.sql_string:
---- Columns readiness_detail (2z6buw)
DESCRIBE SELECT * FROM (select *
from greenplanetmart.reporting_readiness
order by research_area, use_case
) AS "inputQuery-hz"

readiness_detail_length.sql_string:
---- Length readiness_detail (2z6buw)
SELECT COUNT(*) as rowCount FROM (SELECT * FROM (select *
from greenplanetmart.reporting_readiness
order by research_area, use_case
) AS "inputQuery-hz")

readiness_detail_data.sql_string:
---- Data readiness_detail 2z6buw
SELECT * FROM (select *
from greenplanetmart.reporting_readiness
order by research_area, use_case
) AS "inputQuery-hz"
